title: Frozen "Durable Analytical Core"; 12/13-field models per surface
public_claim: Durable Analytical Core is a Red Team Lab handoff for reopening and preserving analytic work across sessions.
distinctive_mechanism: It organizes the lab through a framing board, scope lock, assumption ledger, session ledger, reopen-fidelity analytical core, exact integration packet, registry/canon/workspace/exports structure, and sub-tabs for intake, sources, scope, assumptions, and sessions.
use_value: It matters because red-team work only becomes reusable when assumptions, sources, scope, and sessions survive reopening without losing their reasoning state.
